title: DELEE Glow Sticks, 400PCS Glowsticks Party Packs, Halloween Party Bag Fillers with Bracelet Connectors,Glow Neon Necklaces for Kids Dark Party Supplies,Wedding,Festival Christmas Decoration
features: 🌟 【Multicolor High Quality Glow Sticks】DELEE Glow Sticks party pack contains 400 glow sticks, 400 connectors. Brighten up the night with these fun and vibrant glows at a dark party! Each glow stick party pack includes a variety of neon colors. Bend and shake to activate. Lighted bracelets and necklaces can be made using the included connectors. Entertain kids and adults at your fantastic glow party with the best glow sticks.

🌟 【Halloween Long-lasting glow sticks】We know that when a glow stick loses its brightness, you'll hate it. DELEE 8 inch glow sticks are made of the highest quality materials to ensure the strongest luminous intensity and longest luminous life of 8-12 hours. You can enjoy the glowing party time to the fullest, without worrying about the glow stick brightness disappearing to brighten your whole party.

🌟 【Fun Glowing, Suitable for All Occasions】 Glow sticks are perfect for any event, such as Halloween, New Years, Christmas, Easter and more. Of course also suitable for your birthday parties, concerts, wedding venues, carnivals, disco, and dance bashes. In addition to party decoration, these glow sticks make a great camping survival kit.

🌟 【Waterproof Glow Party Supplies】The glow sticks are waterproof and you can throw the glow sticks into the water for a pool party with lights. You can also make bath time exciting by adding these safe, light-tight dark sticks to your tub while you 're in the shower. Turn off the lights and watch these colorful glow sticks float on the water. Floating glow sticks are a fun and enjoyable visual and sensory activity.

🌟 【Kids Safe, Non-toxic Glow Sticks】Glow sticks are kids' favorite. With non-toxic materials, you can rest assured knowing your kids are safe while playing. Their sturdy design makes them harder to break, so they don't break as easily and start leaking as similar products on the market. We really hope you'll be excited about these great glow sticks. Glow with delee glow sticks at your exciting black light party.
